case_title: THOMSON, JOHN R. VS FEE, MARJORIE E.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-27-1995, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO APR-06-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-27-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF MAR-07-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,162.70 FILED BY THOMSON, JOHN R. AS TO DEFENDANT FEE, MARJORIE E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FEE, MARJORIE E.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-06-1995, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-01-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
UNTIMELY SERVICE NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG DATE ON A SUBSERVE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMSON, JOHN R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEE, MARJORIE E. $1,162.70 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,207.70, DEFENDANT PARTIALLY SATISFIED THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
